Races & Classes

Choose your faction, master Bio Suits, become a battlefield legend

Home›Races & Classes

Three Races

Three opposing factions on planet Novus, each with unique tech trees and ultimate weapons

🛡️

Bellato Federation

Bellato Federation — Heirs of Humanity

Bellato are direct descendants of ancient humanity, inheriting highly advanced mechanical technology. They excel at manufacturing large MAUs (Mechanized Armor Units), overwhelming opponents with powerful mecha firepower. Bellato warriors are known for balanced offense and defense — ideal for beginners.

Racial Traits

Strengths: MAU summoning, balanced offense/defense, team buffs | Weakness: Average single-target burst | Recommended: Beginners, team leaders, mecha enthusiasts

Ultimate Weapon — MAU (Mechanized Armor Unit)

A large rideable weapon developed by Bellato Military Research Institute, controllable by the pilot. MAU evolved from plug-in armor to an independent combat system, providing powerful fire support and area suppression — the core strategic asset of Bellato.

🔫

Accretia Empire

Accretia Empire — Mechanical Overlords

Accretia is a race that fuses flesh with machinery. Their bodies are highly mechanized, granting unparalleled defense and firepower. Accretia warriors are renowned for powerful long-range artillery and impenetrable armor. Their ultimate weapon, the Launcher, unleashes devastating barrages on the battlefield.

Racial Traits

Strengths: Ultra-high defense, ranged fire suppression, AoE damage | Weakness: Lower mobility | Recommended: Tank players, ranged gunners, positional warfare fans

Ultimate Weapon — Launcher

Developed for efficient use of powerful projectile weapons on the battlefield, first successfully created by Accretia Research Institute. The Launcher splits into a chassis frame and weapon frame, freely combinable by tactics — capable of firing missiles, grenades, and energy cannons. A mobile artillery platform.

✨

Holy Cora

Holy Cora — Heirs of Arcane

Cora are the inheritors of ancient Arcane civilization research, manipulating mysterious arcane energy in combat. They can summon powerful biological weapons called Animus, dominating the battlefield with extraordinary magical power. Cora possess the strongest support and healing abilities — indispensable in team battles.

Racial Traits

Strengths: Powerful magic, creature summoning, healing support | Weakness: Lower physical defense | Recommended: Mage players, support healers, summoning fans

Ultimate Weapon — Animus (Summoned Beast)

A biological weapon discovered by Cora after deep research into Arcane heritage. Animus is originally an unknown lifeform from a hyper-universe, used as bio-weapons in Arcane civilization. Communicated through a space creature called the Wanderer, Animus manifests devastating power when summoned into reality.

Six Bio Suit Classes

Bio Suits are Arcane-tech artificial bodies. Wear them to freely use new skills and flight abilities — switch anytime without losing progress.

Ranged DPS

Punisher

A ranged fire expert who dominates the battlefield with bullets and flames. Skilled at identifying enemy weaknesses and executing lethal tactical missions. Beginner-friendly with low skill floor and high returns.

Melee Assassin

Ghost

A cold-blooded high-speed assassin with terrifying speed and lethal damage. Can devastate enemies with agile movements, excels in PVP, but requires higher skill to master.

Frontline Tank

Dreadnought

An unstoppable battlefield vanguard — an irresistible force in itself. Can break through enemy formations and defenses, the core tank role absorbing damage in team battles.

Magic DPS

Cipher

A battlefield leader who materializes force energy, accepting and freely manipulating unknown power. Possesses the strongest AoE magic damage, ideal for beginners who enjoy spell bursts.

Support All-Rounder

Technician

A battlefield all-rounder using drones and turrets for various tactics. Can heal allies and disrupt enemy lines — an indispensable tactical support role in team battles.

Healer Guardian

Informer

A guardian of sacred power, building powerful force barriers to protect allies. Possesses the strongest healing and shielding abilities, bringing inevitable light retribution upon enemies.

Class Tier List

Based on combined PVP & PVE performance (for reference only)

S
Ghost— PVP King, high burst assassin, extremely high skill ceiling
A
Dreadnought— Top tank, team battle core Cipher— Strongest AoE mage, excellent PVE efficiency Informer— Strongest healer, team essential
B
Punisher— Beginner friendly, stable output Technician— Versatile support, flexible tactics
